message:
Add parser event IR contracts, diagnostics taxonomy, canonical AST schema, and multi-engine harness module

Introduce versioned contract/schema/hash constants for Parse Event IR (v2),
parser diagnostics taxonomy (v1), and canonical AST (v1). Add ParseErrorCode
enrichment methods (as_str, stable_diagnostic_code, diagnostic_category),
ParseDiagnosticEnvelope, ParseEventIr, ParserBudget, ParserMode, and
ParserOptions structs. Register parser_multi_engine_harness module in lib.rs.
Refactor hash format to use constants instead of hardcoded "sha256:" strings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
